title: RNA Extraction from Nematodes Using Trizol
author: Manuela Kieninger

steps.title: Take fresh nematodes in an 2
steps.instruction: Take fresh nematodes in an 2.0 ml safe-lock tube spun down in a centrifuge and remove as much supernatant as possible. Or take a previously frozen pellet of nematodes stored in a ultra-low temperature freezer. Keep on ice until Trizol is added.

steps.title: Incubate the sample for 5 min in room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the sample for 5 min in room temperature.

steps.title: I use the Invitrogen TURBO DNA-free Kit
steps.instruction: I use the Invitrogen TURBO DNA-free Kit.

steps.title: Measure 1 µl with the Nanodrop
steps.instruction: Measure 1 µl with the Nanodrop. Record the values.

steps.title: Add 1 ml Trizol to the sample
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml Trizol to the sample.

steps.title: If the nematodes are not in a 2
steps.instruction: If the nematodes are not in a 2.0 ml safe-lock tube move them to a 2.0 ml safe-lock tube.

steps.title: Lower the tube in liquid nitrogen...
steps.instruction: Lower the tube in liquid nitrogen with long tweezers and wait for 30 sec.

steps.title: Take the tube out with long...
steps.instruction: Take the tube out with long tweezers and let them thaw.

steps.title: Vortex the tube for 10 sec
steps.instruction: Vortex the tube for 10 sec.

steps.title: For thawing you can use a...
steps.instruction: For thawing you can use a Eppendorf Thermomix C set to 37 °C and 1000 rpm.

steps.title: As soon as the sample with...
steps.instruction: As soon as the sample with Trizol is thawed vortex the sample and freeze again in liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Repeat the freezing thawing cycles for three cycles in total
steps.instruction: Repeat the freezing thawing cycles for three cycles in total.

steps.title: After the last thaw vortex the...
steps.instruction: After the last thaw vortex the sample for 30 sec and do the next steps in a chemical hood.

steps.title: Add 200 µl Chloroform with Isoamylalcohol...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl Chloroform with Isoamylalcohol and vortex for 1 min.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 3 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 3 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample @ 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample @ 4 °C for 15 min @ 14.000 rcf.

steps.title: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper aqueous phase to a new 1.5 ml tube. Avoid taking the interphase.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 x of the total volume 3M Na Acetate and mix. Then add 0.7 x of the volume Isopropanol and invert at least 20 times.

steps.title: Incubate on ice for 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate on ice for 10 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample @ 4 °C 14
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample @ 4 °C 14.000 rcf for 10 min.

steps.title: You should see a white pellet at the 1
steps.instruction: You should see a white pellet at the 1.5 ml tube. Discard the supernatant without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Add 1 ml 75% Ethanol (cold)...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml 75% Ethanol (cold) and short vortex for 3 sec.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5min @ 8000 rcf 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5min @ 8000 rcf 4 °C.

steps.title: Repeat the Ethanol wash
steps.instruction: Repeat the Ethanol wash.

steps.title: Remove all the Ethanol
steps.instruction: Remove all the Ethanol. Then short spin and pipette off the last remaining Ethanol.

steps.title: Let the pellet air dry for up to 5 min
steps.instruction: Let the pellet air dry for up to 5 min. For small pellets I dry only 2 min.

steps.title: Add 200 µl elution buffer
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl elution buffer. You can also use less if your pellet is small. I would not recommend using less than 100 µl.

steps.title: If the pellet does not dissolve,...
steps.instruction: If the pellet does not dissolve, you can incubate the sample for 10 min @ 37 °C. Pipette mix the sample and proceed to DNAse treatment.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1x of the elution volume 10x TURBO DNase Buffer and pipette mix.

steps.title: Add 1 µl TURBO DNase Enzyme
steps.instruction: Add 1 µl TURBO DNase Enzyme.

steps.title: Incubate @ 37 °C for 20 min (max
steps.instruction: Incubate @ 37 °C for 20 min (max. 30 min).

steps.title: Re-suspend the Inactivation Reagent by vortexing(if...
steps.instruction: Re-suspend the Inactivation Reagent by vortexing(if the liquid is difficult to pipette, add 25% of the bead volume Nuclease-free water andvortex again).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 x of the volume (1µl/10µl) Inactivation Reagentbut min. 2 µl.

steps.title: Pipette mix and incubate 5 min...
steps.instruction: Pipette mix and incubate 5 min @ room temperature and flick the tubes for mixing 2 to 3 times during incubation.

steps.title: Centrifuge 10
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 10.000 rcf for 1:30 min @ room temperature.

steps.title: Take off supernatant with RNA to a new cold 1
steps.instruction: Take off supernatant with RNA to a new cold 1.5 ml tube and put the sample on ice.

steps.title: Measure 1 µl with the RNA Broad Range Qubit Kit
steps.instruction: Measure 1 µl with the RNA Broad Range Qubit Kit. Record the concentration in ng/µl.

steps.title: Measure the RIN value of the...
steps.instruction: Measure the RIN value of the extracted RNA by using 1 µl with the Agilent Tapestation and the RNA tape kit.

steps.title: The RNA should be stored in...
steps.instruction: The RNA should be stored in a ultra-low temperature freezer set to minus 70 to minus 80 °C.
